title: Universal Origins
description: A recreation of the origins mod with custom origins and custom abilities.
body:
This is the first ever release of the custom mod for the Minecraft™ Universal SMP.

What i have added is 6 origins.

**1: Angel. (Guardian Angel):** Instead of the regular 10 full hearts, when you obtain the Angel you get 15 full hearts which makes you more durable.

**2: Warden** The warden origin allows you to shoot a warden beam in the direction you are looking at.

**3: Wither** The wither origin applies the Wither 1 effect to everything in a 20 block radius from you.

**4: Ender Eye** Feeling stealthy? The Ender Eye power allows you to not only become invisible, but also faster than normally. Perfect for sneaking into bases.

**5: Enderman** Want to teleport like an enderman? This origin is for you, it teleports you 20 blocks into the direction you want but watch out, water will hurt.

**6: Blaze** Blazes can shoot very hot fireballs, i would watch out if i were you!

**_In the Beta version these are still randomly assigned and other powers can be crafted. This can possibly change in coming versions._**
